infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to scan guest documents, attach maintenance photos, and send guest-chat photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used for staff voice commands and guest-chat voice notes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to attach photos to guest conversations.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Used to transcribe staff voice commands.
